stimulus:
Welcome.

In this experiment we will ask you to imagine some situations.

Each trial starts with a description of an event.

Then you will see alternative descriptions of that event, and you will rate on a scale how best they match the original description.

You will give your answer by clicking a button on a rating scale.

To do this task, you will have to use your imagination to visualise these events.


Ready?
